attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY ,
WDNRTFR.DV_REVENUE_FLG DV_REVENUE_FLG ,
WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ,
WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD BK_SS_CD ,
WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,
WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
WDNRTFR.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
WDNRTFR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD ,
WDNRTFR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ,
WDNRTFR.LINE_TYPE_CD LINE_TYPE_CD ,
WDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT SPLIT_PCT ,
WDNRTFR.GL_DTM GL_DTM ,
WDNRTFR.GL_POSTED_DTM GL_POSTED_DTM ,
WDNRTFR.RULE_START_DTM RULE_START_DTM ,
WDNRTFR.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD FORWARD_REVERSE_CD ,
WDNRTFR.LAST_RECORD_FLG LAST_RECORD_FLG ,
WDNRTFR.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD ,
WDNRTFR.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,
WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
WDNRTFR.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE ,
WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT ,
WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
WDNRTFR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
WDNRTFR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
WDNRTFR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_KEY AR_TRX_KEY ,
WDNRTFR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY ,
WDNRTFR.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT ,
CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.PRODUCT_KEY = -998 THEN (CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN EV.ITEM_KEY ELSE 5863624 /*ERP_NA_PROD*/ END)  ELSE WDNRTFR.PRODUCT_KEY END PRODUCT_KEY,
 WDNRTFR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD ,
WDNRTFR.DV_CHARGES_FLG DV_CHARGES_FLG ,
WDNRTFR.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG ,
WDNRTFR.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG ,
WDNRTFR.DV_MISC_FLG DV_MISC_FLG ,
WDNRTFR.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG ,
WDNRTFR.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG ,
WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG DV_SERVICE_FLG ,
WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT ,
WDNRTFR.DV_EXTENDED_QTY DV_EXTENDED_QTY ,
WDNRTFR.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY ,
WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG ,
WDRTCN.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM ,
WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ,
WDNRTFR.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM ,
WDNRTFR.SHIPPED_DT SHIPPED_DT ,
WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD ,
WDNRTFR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
WDNRTFR.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME ,
WDNRTFR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD ,
WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_FLG MAJOR_LINE_FLG ,
WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
WDNRTFR.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
WDNRTFR.SERVICE_TYPE_CD SERVICE_TYPE_CD ,
WDNRTFR.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT ,
WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT ,
WDNRTFR.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT ,
WDNRTFR.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD ,
WDNRTFR.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
WDNRTFR.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
WDNRTFR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY ,
WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME ,
WDNRTFR.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD ,
WDNRTFR.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
WDNRTFR.SALES_REP_NUM SALES_REP_NUM ,
WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_DT DV_FISCAL_DT ,
WDNRTFR.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD,
(CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1
WHEN WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1
ELSE WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
END) RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
WDNRTFR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLG,
WDNRTFR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
WDNRTFR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE,
DV_COMP_FUNC_REBATE_AMT,
DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
WDNRTFR.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
WDNRTFR.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
WDNRTFR.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_RV_OOD WDNRTFR
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SDNRTFR
ON (
WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT = SDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
AND WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = SDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD 
)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_REV_TRX_CNTRCT_NUM_OOD WDRTCN 
 ON ( WDRTCN.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT =WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
AND WDRTCN.BK_SS_CD=WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD)
  INNER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_SRVC_FIN_ACCOUNT_PID_MAP EV
 ON (EV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE=WDNRTFR.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD)

SELECT 
RANK() OVER(ORDER BY WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT, WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD) + SMDNRTFRKEY.MAX_VAL DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY  ,
WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT  ,
WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD ,
USER ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)              
FROM 
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SMDNRTFR ) SMDNRTFRKEY,   /* Veed to Update  STGDB     witth   ETLVWDB     once the tables are  created  */
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_RV_OOD  WDNRTFR
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SDNRTFR    /* Veed to Update  STGDB     witth   ETLVWDB     once the tables are  created  */
	 WHERE WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = SDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD
	 AND WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT  = SDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT )

SELECT 
WDNRTFR_SRVCE_CONTRACT_NUM.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ,
WDNRTFR_SRVCE_CONTRACT_NUM.BK_SS_CD BK_SS_CD ,
WDNRTFR_SRVCE_CONTRACT_NUM.CLEANED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
CASE WHEN WDNRTFR_SRVCE_CONTRACT_NUM.DV_SERVICE_FLG ='N' OR WDNRTFR_SRVCE_CONTRACT_NUM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD='GL'  THEN NULL
	 ELSE
	 (CASE 
 		WHEN CHARACTERS( WDNRTFR_SRVCE_CONTRACT_NUM.CLEANED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM) =7 THEN  CLEANED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  
		ELSE NULL 
	  END )
END SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM
FROM 
(
SELECT 
WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ,
WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD BK_SS_CD ,
WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD, 
WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG ,
CASE 
WHEN SUBSTRING (WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS( WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM ) -49 FOR 1	) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
THEN  ''
ELSE SUBSTRING (WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS( WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM ) -49 FOR 1	)

WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-7 FOR 1	) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
THEN  '' 
ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-7 FOR 1	)
END ||
CASE
WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-6 FOR 1	) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
THEN  '' 
ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-6 FOR 1	)
END ||
CASE
WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-5 FOR 1	) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
THEN  '' 
ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-5 FOR 1	)
END ||
CASE
WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-4 FOR 1	) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
THEN  '' 
ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-4 FOR 1	)
END ||
CASE
WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-3 FOR 1	) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
THEN  '' 
ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-3 FOR 1	)
END  ||
CASE
WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-2 FOR 1	) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
THEN  '' 
ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-2 FOR 1	)
END ||
CASE
WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-1 FOR 1	) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
THEN  '' 
ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-1 FOR 1	)
END ||
CASE
WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-0 FOR 1	) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
THEN  '' 
ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-0 FOR 1	)
END CLEANED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_RV_OOD WDNRTFR
) WDNRTFR_SRVCE_CONTRACT_NUM
